note: Reflects the latest available at time of writing. Update this file by hand as these events resolve — no live API or CMS needed.

items.title: Skyroot's Vikram-1 — "Mission Aagaman"
items.detail: India's first private orbital launch attempt, targeting a 450 km, 60° inclination low Earth orbit. Vikram-1 can carry up to 350 kg to LEO. All stages were fully stacked at the pad as of early July 2026.

items.title: Gaganyaan G1 uncrewed test flight
items.detail: Carries the humanoid stand-in Vyommitra. Originally eyed for February 2026, now targeted for the second half of the year following extra review after the EOS-N1 anomaly. G2, G3, and the first crewed flight (H1, targeted 2027) follow.

items.title: PSLV third-stage anomaly review
items.detail: An ISRO expert committee is reviewing two consecutive anomalies — EOS-09 (May 2025) and EOS-N1 (Jan 2026) — on a vehicle with 60+ successful missions since 1994.

items.title: Chandrayaan-4 in development
items.detail: Cabinet-approved lunar sample-return mission requiring two LVM3 launches and in-orbit docking of five modules.
